title: Memory saturation when executing prepared statements
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Employees (ID UInt32, Name String NOT NULL, Age UInt32 CHECK(Age >= 18), Salary Float64 DEFAULT 0.0) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ID;
UPDATE Employees SET Salary = Salary * 1.1 WHERE Age > 28;
SELECT Name, Salary FROM Employees WHERE Salary IS NOT NULL ORDER BY Salary DESC;
key_bug_features: Executing prepared statements multiple times causes memory saturation
